g.title: Transaction is currently executing or was interrupted before commit/abort.
Transaction has successfully persisted a COMMIT log record.
Transaction was explicitly rolled back or aborted by the recovery manager.

ol.li: Analysis Phase: Reconstructs the TTAB from the last checkpoint. Identifies transactions as ACTIVE, COMMITTED, or ABORTED.
Redo Phase: Repeats history to bring the database to the state at the time of failure.
Undo Phase: Processes all transactions that remained in ACTIVE state at the end of Analysis. These are transitioned to ABORTED.

div.p: Undo Constraint: Transactions in status 0x01 are the only candidates for rollback during Undo Phase.

g.title: Transaction is currently executing or was interrupted before commit/abort.
Transaction has successfully persisted a COMMIT log record.
Transaction was explicitly rolled back or aborted by the recovery manager.
